configurations.name: 448app
runtimeArgs:
use IO::Socket::INET; $|=1; my $s=IO::Socket::INET->new(LocalPort=>3000,Listen=>20,ReuseAddr=>1) or die $!; while(my $c=$s->accept){binmode $c; eval{my $req=''; while(my $l=<$c>){$req.=$l; last if $l eq "
"} my ($f)=$req=~/GET /(\S*)/; $f||='index.html'; $f=~s/\?.*//; my $p='C:/aia/448app/'.$f; if(-f $p){open my $fh,'<:raw',$p; local $/; my $b=<$fh>; close $fh; my $ct=$p=~/\.html$/?'text/html; charset=utf-8':($p=~/\.js$/?'text/javascript; charset=utf-8':($p=~/\.css$/?'text/css; charset=utf-8':($p=~/\.json$/?'application/json':($p=~/\.svg$/?'image/svg+xml':'application/octet-stream')))); my $cl=length($b); print $c "HTTP/1.0 200 OK
Content-Type: $ct
Content-Length: $cl
Connection: close

".$b;}else{print $c "HTTP/1.0 404 Not Found
Connection: close

Not found";}}; shutdown($c,1); close $c;}
